prerequisites.value: Cha 15, Combat Expertise, Diva Style, Improved Feint, base attack bonus +7 or bard level 7th.

description.value: **Benefit:** While using Diva Style, the first time you hit with a melee weapon in a round, you deal an additional amount of damage equal to your Charisma modifier to a target that is denied its Dexterity bonus to AC. This damage is precision-based, and is not multiplied on a critical hit.
